segments.text: Once they lock in that kill percentage
segments.original_text: 一度吹っ飛ぶためのパーセントさえ確保してしまえば

segments.text: everything opens up so much better from there
segments.original_text: ある程度採掘もさらに良く回せるかというところですが

full_text: Once they lock in that kill percentage everything opens up so much better from there This is perfect!
